creator: lane@joeandlane.com
text:
Sem,

I'm sorry the mail server rejected your attempt to email me.  I use SpamCop, 
and half the time even I don't know who is being rejected.

But perhaps you could post any recommendations or requests for information to 
the pr database so that I can get this resolved and others may become 
educated with me?

If there is a way to get portupgrade even more up to date than it is then 
please let me know.

Or if there is some other workaround then that'd be helpful, too.

Thanks,

lane
